subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant! Thou hast written to Jinab-i-Manshadí concerning the Feast... Thou hast written regarding Buddha and Confucius… Let the beloved of God gather together and associate most lovingly
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان در خصوص میهمانی بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودی این میهمانی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
